body: ## Recovery diagnosis (CTO via [ZAI-107](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-107)) The previous run produced commit `3125b882` (`feat(i18n): localize AgentConfigForm.tsx`) just before timing out, but **the commit cannot be pushed** — the `.githooks/pre-push` i18n-only guardrail (acceptance criterion #4) rejects it. That's why the work never reached remote and the issue was stranded. ### What the pre-push hook flagged in `3125b882` `scripts/check-i18n-only-diff.sh` requires every added TSX line in i18n commits to match an allowed pattern (literal `t("...")` call, `react-i18next` import, hook dep array, etc.). The commit fails on these added lines (35 violations on `AgentConfigForm.tsx`): 1. **Refactored option-array shape** (treated as a feature change, not i18n wiring): - `type ThinkingEffortOption = { id: string; labelKey: string };` - `const codexThinkingEffortOptions: ReadonlyArray = [` - …each `{ id: "...", labelKey: "config_form.options.*" }` row - Same for `openCodeThinkingEffortOptions`, `cursorModeOptions`, `claudeThinkingEffortOptions` - Render site: `{t(option.labelKey)}` — dynamic key arg, regex requires literal `t("...")` 2. **`` component usage** for the cheap-model fallback note — the guardrail regex only matches `t("...")` / `i18n.t("...")` literal calls; `` JSX is not in the allowlist. 3. **Cosmetic ternary reformatting** flagged on lines like `result.status === "pass"`, `: result.status === "warn"`, `|| (allowDefault`, `{detectingModel`, `: detectedModel` — re-indented lines that don't carry a `t()` call. These are pure formatting drift and violate criterion #4. 4. **Interface widening:** `options: ReadonlyArray;` (changed contract on a prop type). ### Remediation plan Use the same playbook that fixed [ZAI-89](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-89) (commit `db22a5ce`): **inline `t()` calls at the render site, leave constants and component shapes untouched**. For `AgentConfigForm.tsx` specifically: - **Revert the option-array refactor.** Keep the original `{ id, label: "Auto" }` shape on `codexThinkingEffortOptions`, `openCodeThinkingEffortOptions`, `cursorModeOptions`, `claudeThinkingEffortOptions` — do **not** introduce `ThinkingEffortOption` or `labelKey`. At the render site, translate inline with literal keys, e.g. a small switch or a literal lookup so every added line contains a literal `t("...")`. - **Replace the ``** with the original DOM split using literal `t()` calls, e.g. `<>{t("config_form.cheap_model.fallback_prefix")}{adapterDefaultModel}{t("config_form.cheap_model.fallback_suffix")}`. Add the two new keys to `en/agents.json` + `ru/agents.json` and drop the `Trans` import. - **Eliminate cosmetic reflow.** Don't re-indent or split ternaries that aren't strictly required to insert a `t()` call. The `git diff` for each edited region should add only lines that introduce a translation. - **Preserve interface contracts.** Don't widen prop types, don't change identifier names, don't reorder constants. Verify locally before pushing: ```bash bash scripts/check-i18n-only-diff.sh master..HEAD # must print "OK: all TSX changes are i18n-only" pnpm -C ui exec tsc -b --noEmit ``` Once the diff is clean, push and **then** capture the screenshots required by acceptance criterion #3 (route `/agents/:agentId/properties` in `ru` and `en`). Final CEO sign-off (criterion #6) follows screenshots. ### Adjacent finding (informational, not blocking this issue) The same `git push` of `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization` also surfaced violations in earlier commits on the branch — `db22a5ce` (Inbox.tsx, ZAI-89) and `d850315c` (NewProjectDialog.tsx, ZAI-93). They are out of scope for this recovery but will need to be cleaned up before the branch can publish; flagging so the next agent doesn't push and get blocked again. ### Status - Recovery issue [ZAI-107](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-107) → `done` (concrete next action recorded here). - This issue → `todo`, reassigned to Localization Agent. Existing commit `3125b882` is still on `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization` HEAD; amend or follow up rather than starting from scratch. - No deliverable scope change — same file, same acceptance criteria; only the diff shape needs correction.

Paperclip automatically retried dispatch for this assigned `todo` issue during terminal run recovery, but it still has no live execution path. Latest retry failure: `timeout` - Timed out after 2400s. Moving it to `blocked` so it is visible for intervention.
- Recovery issue: [ZAI-107](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-107)
- Next action: the recovery owner should either restore a live execution path or record the manual resolution, then mark the recovery issue done.

Recovery task: [ZAI-102](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-102).
